original_query: select  i_item_desc       ,w_warehouse_name       ,d1.d_week_seq       ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is null then 1 else 0 end) no_promo       ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is not null then 1 else 0 end) promo       ,count(*) total_cnt from catalog_sales join inventory on (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk) join warehouse on (w_warehouse_sk=inv_warehouse_sk) join item on (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk) join customer_demographics on (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk) join household_demographics on (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk) join date_dim d1 on (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk) join date_dim d2 on (inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk) join date_dim d3 on (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk) left outer join promotion on (cs_promo_sk=p_promo_sk) left outer join catalog_returns on (cr_item_sk = cs_item_sk and cr_order_number = cs_order_number) where d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq   and inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity   and d3.d_date > d1.d_date + interval '3 day'   and hd_buy_potential = '1001-5000'   and d1.d_year = 2000   and cd_marital_status = 'S'   and cd_dep_count between 6 and 8   and i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women')   and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 69 AND 89 group by i_item_desc,w_warehouse_name,d1.d_week_seq order by total_cnt desc, i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d_week_seq limit 100;
rewritten_query:
select i_item_desc
      ,w_warehouse_name
      ,d1.d_week_seq
      ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is null then 1 else 0 end) no_promo
      ,sum(case when p_promo_sk is not null then 1 else 0 end) promo
      ,count(*) total_cnt
from date_dim d1
join catalog_sales on (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk)
join item on (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk AND i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women'))
join customer_demographics on (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk AND cd_marital_status = 'S' AND cd_dep_count between 6 and 8)
join household_demographics on (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk AND hd_buy_potential = '1001-5000')
join date_dim d2 on (d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq)
join inventory on (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk AND inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity)
join warehouse on (w_warehouse_sk = inv_warehouse_sk)
join date_dim d3 on (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk AND d3.d_date > d1.d_date + interval '3 day')
left join promotion on (cs_promo_sk = p_promo_sk)
where d1.d_year = 2000
  and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 69 AND 89
group by i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq
order by total_cnt desc, i_item_desc, w_warehouse_name, d1.d_week_seq
limit 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Remove the unnecessary left join to catalog_returns table as it's not being used in the SELECT clause or anywhere else in the query.
